resume_text: John Doe - Software Engineer with 5+ years experience in React, Node.js, and MongoDB. Previously worked at Tech Corp building scalable web applications. Skills include: JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, Docker, AWS. Led development of microservices architecture serving 1M+ users.
job_description: We are hiring a Senior Full-Stack Developer with expertise in React and Node.js for our growing startup. The ideal candidate should have 5+ years of experience, knowledge of MongoDB, and experience with cloud platforms like AWS. You will be responsible for building our next-generation platform.
